name_en: Top-tier Replica [Exclusive Photo M12664 Yellow] This card case is crafted from Monogram Heritage canvas with a slim silhouette, easily fitting into a pocket or handbag. The flap is secured with a hidden snap, revealing a fan-fold compartment and card slots. Calfskin lining and the Marque L.Vuitton Déposée logo, derived from Damier canvas, add refined details. 8 x 1 x 10.5 cm (H x W x L)
